description_long: This is a pair of low-top Converse Cons sneakers, predominantly red with white accents and black trim. The shoes feature a canvas upper with a white rubber toe cap and a white midsole, accented by a thin black stripe. The Converse star and chevron logo is prominently displayed in white on the side, while the heel tab features a red patch with a white star. The shoes have red laces threaded through metal eyelets and a padded tongue with a white 'CONS' label. The overall design is sporty and casual, suitable for urban environments and everyday wear.
description: A pair of red Converse Cons low-top sneakers with white accents, black trim, and red laces. Features include a canvas upper, rubber toe cap, and prominent star logos.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white star and chevron logo, red canvas upper, and white rubber toe cap.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded white toe caps, red laces, and tongue labels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the star and chevron logo, black midsole stripe, and visible lacing.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the red heel tabs with white star logos and the low-cut collar.
attribute_logo: White star and chevron on the side, red heel tab with white star, white 'CONS' label on tongue
